title: trachyrhachis barbellata
intro: Trachyrhachis barbellata, also known as the 'spiny fruit tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to India and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
